title: M2-03c: Add queue limit and offline indicator UI
acceptance_criteria: Queue has max 20 messages (per target spec)
If queue exceeds max, oldest messages dropped with warning
UI shows indicator: 'X messages pending' when offline
Indicator appears in ConnectionStatus or similar component
deliverables: Modified WebSocketProvider.tsx with queue limit logic
Modified ConnectionStatus.tsx with pending messages indicator
completed_summary: Implemented in WebSocketProvider.tsx with pendingCount and showOfflineBanner
